instruction: Explain the potential impact of this vulnerability.
input: The APDFL.dll contains an out-of-bounds write past the fixed-length heap-based buffer while parsing specially crafted PDF files. This could allow an attacker to execute code in the context of the current process.
output: Exploiting this vulnerability could lead to Arbitrary Code Execution (ACE), allowing an attacker to execute malicious code within the context of the vulnerable application. This may potentially give the attacker the ability to compromise the system or access sensitive information.
